zh.lifeSummary: 當Allarum de Cornouaille於大約0990年出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓吉利爾斯時，她的父親Benedict Budic VIII24歲，母親Guinodeon de Vannes11歲。她和Guethenoc de Porhoet至少有2個兒子。她去世於大約1040年在法國布列塔尼享年52歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Allarum de Cornouaille于大约0990年出生在法国布列塔尼莫比韓吉利爾斯时，她的父亲Benedict Budic VIII24岁，母亲Guinodeon de Vannes11岁。她和Guethenoc de Porhoet至少有2个儿子。她去世于大约1040年在法国布列塔尼享年52岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

en.lifeSummary: When Allarum de Cornouaille was born about 0990, in Guilliers, Morbihan, Brittany, France, her father, Benedict Budic VIII, was 24 and her mother, Guinodeon de Vannes, was 11. She had at least 2 sons with Guethenoc de Porhoet. She died about 1040, in Brittany, France, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Allarum de Cornouaille est née environ 0990, à Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, son père, Benedict Budic VIII, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Guinodeon de Vannes, avait 11 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Guethenoc de Porhoet. Elle est décédée environ 1040, à Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Allarum de Cornouaille um 0990 in Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Benedict Budic VIII 24 und ihre Mutter Guinodeon de Vannes 11. Sie hatte mit Guethenoc de Porhoet mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb um 1040 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Bretagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Allarum de Cornouaille è nata il circa 0990 nel Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Benedict Budic VIII, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Guinodeon de Vannes, aveva 11 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Guethenoc de Porhoet. Morì circa 1040, nel Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.Cornouaille, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne,: フランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアイン

ja.lifeSummary: Allarum de Cornouailleが約0990年にフランスブレタグンモービハングイリールズで生まれた時，父Benedict Budic VIIIは24歳，母Guinodeon de Vannesは11歳であった。彼女はGuethenoc de Porhoetとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は約1040年にフランスブレタグンで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Allarum de Cornouaille(이)가 대략 0990년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 길리어스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Benedict Budic VIII(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Guinodeon de Vannes(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 Guethenoc de Porhoet(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1040년 프랑스 브레타그니에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Abt 990–Abt 1040: tany ho any amin'ny 0990–tany ho any amin'ny 1040

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Allarum de Cornouaille nasceu aproximadamente 0990, em Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Benedict Budic VIII, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Guinodeon de Vannes, tinha 11 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Guethenoc de Porhoet. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1040, em Bretagne, França, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Allarum de Cornouaille родилась около 0990 г. в местности гуиллиирс, морбихань, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Benedict Budic VIII было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Guinodeon de Vannes, 11. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Guethenoc de Porhoet. Она умерла около 1040 г. в местности бретагн, Франция в возрасте 52 лет.

sm.Abt 990–Abt 1040: e tusa o le 0990–e tusa o le 1040
sm.from about 1021 to 1036: mai le e tusa o le 1021 e o'o I le 1036

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Allarum de Cornouaille nació aproximadamente 0990, en Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Benedict Budic VIII, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Guinodeon de Vannes, tenía 11 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Guethenoc de Porhoet. Murió aproximadamente 1040, en Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 52 años.
